Petition Seeking To Invalidate The Phillip Corsello 2011 Trust
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3))
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Heard with case PTR-12-2956677, The Leo and Francesca Corsello Trust.

Appearances: Gary Cohen for Antoinette Hackler. Carrie Mouton for Vita Marcum. Jason Louie for Phillip Balistrieri.

Mr. Louie reported that all parties have resolved their disputes, explained what some of the terms of the settlement are and stated that they agreed to have a neutral third party appointed as Trustee. Discussion was held as to whether a petition for approval of the settlement agreement was needed. Counsel indicated that they are not seeking Court approval of the settlement. Both matters were taken under submission. Counsel to submit a stipulation and order with regard to appointment of the neutral fiduciary.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition Seeking To Invalidate The Phillip Corsello 2011 Trust
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Continued To Jun-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Seeking To Invalidate The Phillip Corsello 2011 Trust
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3))
Off Calendar Feb-04-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-12-295677 The Leo Corsello and Francesca Corsello Living Trust.

Appearances: Jason Louie for Phillip Balistrieri. Carrie Moulton for Vita Marcum (Heir at Law). Garry Cohen for Antoinette Hackler (Objector).

Mr. Louie stated that both Counsel will file objections by close of businesss today, that they are making very good progress in settlement, that they anticipate having the settlement signed by the end of next week and that they will not be filing a Petition for Approval of The Settlement Agreement. The Petition for Order Confirming Assets and the Petition for Order Confirming Beneficiary, etc. was continued to April 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a Notice of Settlement and a petition to appoint a Private Fiduciary.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order Confirming Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3))
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Continued To Feb-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-12-295677 The Leo J. Corsello and Franchesca Corsello Living Trust.

Appearances: Jason Louie for Phillip Balistrieri. Garry Cohen for Antoinette Hackler (Beneficiary). Carrie Moulton for Vita Marcum (Intestate Heir).

Counsel agreed to have the order (295677) validating the Trust and appointing the Trustee signed striking the portions regarding the provision confirming the Beneficiary and confirming title to assets (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). Counsel also agreed to a 6-week continuance so that they can work on resolution. The Court expressed concern about the Parents Trust transferring directly to Phillips Trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Assets (295676) and the two remaining issues/balance of the petition in case number 295677 are continued to February 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Confirming Assets (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3))
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Continued To Dec-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-12-295677 The Leo J. Corsello and Francesca Corsello Living Trust.

Appearances: Jason Louie for Petitioner. Gary Cohen for Antoinette Hackler (Instestate Heir/Objector). Carrie Moulton for Vita Marcum (Intestate Heir).

Mr. Louie stated that Counsel have met and that they are making very good progress to reach resolution. Counsel concurred. Mr. Louie also stated that they have perfected service on 32 Heirs, that they are working on perfecting service on the others and proposed that they come back in 6 weeks. Both Petitions for Order Validating Trust; Appointing Trustee, etc. was continued to December 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Ruiz.
